title: The Dark Moose
content:
{{Top|rwp|sortkey=*The Dark Moose}}
'''''The Dark Moose''''' (name withheld) co-wrote the backstory of the [[Unstable Terrain Artillery Transport/Legends|Unstable Terrain Artillery Transport]] and the [[DC0052 Intergalactic speeder]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

He was a [[StarWars.com Message Boards]] forum moderator on [[StarWars.com]].

==Works==
===Bibliography===

*{{DB|vehicle|dc0052intergalacticspeeder|DC0052 Intergalactic speeder}} (co-written by [[Nathan Butler]]) - April [[2006]]
